description: 30 medium-hard live coach tests (no PDF/session names in questions). Paste query into http://localhost:3000/coach. Source file is for your scoring only.

pdfs.query: I'm still quoting and running every job myself even with two guys on the payroll. What's the realistic order of delegation so I'm not the bottleneck on every decision?
Work is booked solid but I'm always scrambling to pay suppliers before the next deposit lands. What fast levers can I pull this month without taking on bad debt?
All my trade income lands in one account and I keep spending from whatever's left. How should I split money so tax, wages, and profit don't get eaten by operating costs?
A renovation client replied that we're 'way more expensive' than the other quote and wants a discount before they'll book. How should I respond without racing to the bottom?
My marketing is aimed at the perfect dream client, but most of my work still comes from a messier mix of jobs. Should I market to who's paying me now or who I want in two years?
Our Monday toolbox talks turn into complaint sessions and nothing gets tracked. What structure would make a weekly team huddle actually change behaviour on site?
I'm about to hire my first apprentice and I'm worried about picking the wrong person and wasting six months. What should I verify before I offer the role?
I get a lot of 'just send me a price' calls and half never book. What should I be asking on the first enquiry call to filter tyre-kickers early?
Revenue is up but profit feels flat — which five areas of a trade business should I diagnose first before I blame the economy?
Everyone says 'document your systems' but I've got quotes, installs, invoicing, and callbacks all tangled. Where do I start mapping what actually matters for a residential plumbing business?

json_with_video_url.query: I tried systemising once and it turned into a binder nobody uses. Why do tradie owners resist systems, and what's a sane first process to capture instead of copying McDonald's?

json_with_video_url.source: WTF is Cash vs Accrual and why you MUST know.json
json_with_video_url.query: My bookkeeper says we're profitable on paper but I feel broke every Thursday. Why can a healthy bank balance still poison how I judge whether the business is actually performing?

json_with_video_url.source: Expert Session with Rhys from Kaha Digital(1).json
json_with_video_url.query: Google Analytics shows hundreds of visits a month to our site but the office phone barely rings. What are the most likely on-page or offer problems to audit first?

json_with_video_url.source: Financial Jam with Two Drunk Accountants.json
json_with_video_url.query: It's early July and last year was a grind, but I still feel weirdly optimistic. Why would the start of a new financial year feel like a fresh footy season for tradies?
EOFY is three weeks away and my records are a shoebox of receipts. What should a trade business owner prioritise so they're not scrambling on the last night of June?

json_with_video_url.source: Done With You Session with Nic & Waz on Meeting Structure.json
json_with_video_url.query: We have a weekly leadership meeting but the same three issues reappear and nothing is owned to a deadline. What meeting rhythm and agenda habits actually stick for a 12-person electrical company?

json_with_video_url.source: How To Say No To Crappy Jobs.json
json_with_video_url.query: A builder keeps feeding us margin-killer variations and expects instant turnaround. How do I decline or reprice bad-fit work without torching the relationship?

json_with_video_url.source: Michael Griffiths Expert Session on Referral Based Marketing.json
json_with_video_url.query: I'm spending on boosted posts but repeat work still comes from blokes who know a bloke. What would a referral-first approach look like compared to chasing cold leads on social?
A past client wants warranty work on a kitchen we finished about a year ago and they're already angry in the group chat. How do I set the boundary without a blow-up?
I was three weeks into a daily focus habit, had a brutal week on the tools, and now I've stopped completely. What's the intended mindset when you slip — punish yourself or reset?

json_without_video_url.query: An expert used improv-style exercises in a webinar to explain how tradies actually change behaviour. What's the core idea behind learning through that format versus a normal slide deck?

In one done-with-you session they talked about a 'right now' customer versus parking the 'ideal' one. When cash flow is tight, is it smarter to market to who is already buying or hold out for the dream client?

json_without_video_url.source: 7 Myths of Systemising your Business with James Brown.json
json_without_video_url.query: My old boss tried systems with a consultant and it failed, so my crew thinks documentation is corporate nonsense. What myths make tradies sabotage systemising before they start?

json_without_video_url.source: Clea Jones on The 9 Mental Roadblocks Stopping You From Being a Content Marketing Rockstar.json
json_without_video_url.query: I know I should post on social but I freeze every time. What are the common mental roadblocks that stop owners from showing up consistently as a 'content' person?
I've got three employees and no HR person. What compliance and people risks do most trade businesses overlook until something blows up?

json_without_video_url.source: Turning Your Ideas Into Content with Sam Winch.json
json_without_video_url.query: I've got years of job-site stories but nothing published. How do you turn messy trade experience into content ideas without sounding like a generic marketing guru?

json_without_video_url.source: Write Your Sexy Job Ad (Sexy Ad Builder).json
json_without_video_url.query: My last job ad got crickets — just 'must have licence, must be reliable.' What makes a tradie job ad actually attract the right applicant instead of another time-waster?

json_without_video_url.source: Influence and Profit Accelerator with Joe Pane.json
json_without_video_url.query: I close jobs fine on site but struggle to influence my team and suppliers when I'm not there. What links influence skills to profit in a small trade business?
New members often ask the same nervous questions in the first live Q&A. What themes usually come up about getting value from the community in the first 90 days?

json_without_video_url.source: Getting the Most Out of the Tradiepreneur Program.json
json_without_video_url.query: I pay for membership but only watch random replays. What habits separate members who transform their business from those who stay stuck consuming content?
